auth.name: Name
auth.accept_terms: I agree to the Terms & Privacy Policy

forgotPassword.title: Forgot Password?
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email address and we'll send you a password reset link.
forgotPassword.successMessage: If an account exists with this email, you will receive a password reset link shortly.

resetPassword.title: Reset Password
resetPassword.description: Create a new secure password for your QuizAtlas account.
resetPassword.successMessage: Your password has been changed successfully. You can now sign in with your new password.

welcome.title: Welcome Back
welcome.description: Continue your learning journey with QuizAtlas. Practice, improve your skills and monitor your progress.

acceptance.title: Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.content: By using QuizAtlas, you agree to these Terms of Service and all applicable laws and regulations.

accounts.title: User Accounts
accounts.content: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activities performed under your account.

quizzes.title: Quiz Content
quizzes.content: QuizAtlas provides educational quizzes to help users learn and practice. Content may be updated or removed at any time.

intellectual.title: Intellectual Property
intellectual.content: All QuizAtlas content, branding, design, logos and software remain the property of QuizAtlas unless otherwise stated.

liability.title: Limitation of Liability
liability.content: QuizAtlas is provided as-is without warranties. We are not responsible for any damages resulting from the use of the platform.

contact.title: Contact
contact.content: If you have questions regarding these Terms, please contact the QuizAtlas team.

collection.title: Information We Collect
collection.content: We collect only the information necessary to create your account and improve your learning experience.

usage.title: How We Use Your Information
usage.content: Your information is used to authenticate your account, track your progress and improve QuizAtlas.

security.title: Data Security
security.content: We use reasonable technical and organizational measures to protect your personal information.

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.content: QuizAtlas may use cookies to remember your preferences and improve your browsing experience.

rights.title: Your Rights
rights.content: You may request access, correction or deletion of your personal data according to applicable laws.

contact.title: Contact
contact.content: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact the QuizAtlas team.
